title: Spicy Indian Split Peas Stir-fry
description: A spicy and tender dish featuring light yellow split peas in a zesty pickle sauce, perfect for a quick meal.
instructions: Rinse and soak the split peas in water for about 30 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add oil, then cumin seeds, green chili peppers, and finely chopped pickle. Stir-fry until the peppers are soft and fragrant.
Add garlic and sauté for another minute or two until fragrant.
Stir in split peas, garam masala powder, salt, and a splash of water to cover them. Bring to boil, then reduce heat to low.
Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until the peas are tender.
Drizzle in lime juice and yogurt, adjust seasoning as needed, and stir thoroughly.
Serve hot with a side of brown rice or naan bread.
